title: Youtube Comment mod
description: I asked my youtube comment section for ideas for a mod and they had some... ideas
body:
I asked my youtube comment section for ideas for a mod and they had some... ideas

This is a really chaotic mod and I wouldn't recommend grinding a lot on it because it might explode also I recommenced installing JEI because I am not making a wiki for this stupid mod

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/7_ScNTySTKU" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
THIS IS A WALLMART
it is one of two structures that is added by this mod the second one is a target

![WALLMART](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/580b778c7da446f0296e6fcf458c818c38116b72_0.webp)

this is all the stupid stuff that the mod adds 

![various Items that the mod adds: a cloud a cloud block a finger gun moldy cheese block normal cheese block cheese a hard hat crazy cheese a white spawn egg a squirt gun an oven another white egg a bomb a musket ball a banana a water balloon a bread banana an umbrella galvanized square steel a bucket of mortar  a halo energy sword a propeller hat coffee dried up leaf's a car helicopter bread bread block stale bread block bread of summoning hamburger a strong sword a spoon that is comically large and a broken sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/592c4fbe0ec8e92ecf22b81fcfab379f66bf925e.png)
